message: Passing through the beautiful front, I head to Meryl's room.
However, after several knocks with no response, I had no choice but to ask at the front desk.
Yes, Ms. Meryl Ann Kline is currently out. If you have any messages, I will be happy to take them.
I see. I will come back later.
I told the elderly front desk clerk that and left the hotel.
Sir, Ms. Meryl Ann Kline still hasn’t returned yet,
Then, could I leave a message? This is Jake Snipes; I would like to be contacted.
Mr. Jake Snipes, understood. I will definitely convey that.
Sir, Ms. Meryl Ann Kline has not returned yet.
